query: Find 10 parcels in Stavanger municipality that are located in agricultural land, sorted by teigid ascending.
error: Error code: 400 - {'error': {'message': 'Invalid prompt: your prompt was flagged as potentially violating our usage policy. Please try again with a different prompt: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/reasoning#advice-on-prompting', 'type': 'invalid_request_error', 'param': None, 'code': 'invalid_prompt'}}

1.description: get kommunenummer and geometry for Stavanger municipality

2.description: get AR50 polygons (agricultural candidates) clipped to Stavanger extent and inspect category columns

3.description: get teig parcels in Stavanger (filtered by kommunenummer)

4.description: find teig polygons that intersect agricultural AR50 polygons

5.description: deduplicate to one row per teig

6.description: sort teig results by teigid ascending

errors: Error code: 400 - {'error': {'message': 'Invalid prompt: your prompt was flagged as potentially violating our usage policy. Please try again with a different prompt: https://platform.openai.com/docs/guides/reasoning#advice-on-prompting', 'type': 'invalid_request_error', 'param': None, 'code': 'invalid_prompt'}}

executions.sql:
WITH kommune AS (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='1103')
SELECT ogc_fid, artype, arjordbr, areal, ST_SRID(wkb_geometry) AS srid
FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50"
WHERE (arjordbr IS NOT NULL) AND ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, (SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) FROM kommune));

args.sql:
WITH kommune AS (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='1103')
SELECT ogc_fid, artype, arjordbr, areal, ST_SRID(wkb_geometry) AS srid

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer, kommunenavn, omrade, ST_SRID(omrade) AS srid
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE '%Stavanger%';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [arealressurskart_ar50]
WITH kommune AS (SELECT omrade FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune WHERE kommunenummer='1103')
SELECT ogc_fid, artype, arjordbr, areal, ST_SRID(wkb_geometry) AS srid
FROM public."0000_25833_ar50_gdb__ar50"
WHERE (arjordbr IS NOT NULL) AND ST_Intersects(wkb_geometry, (SELECT ST_Envelope(omrade) FROM kommune));
